name: Anadi

heritages.name: Adaptive Anadi
heritages.description: You descend from a line of anadi who worked to perfect their transformation magic, allowing them to integrate into a wider variety of cultures.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

heritages.name: Polychromatic Anadi
heritages.description: Your body is covered with exceptionally colorful hairs that create vibrant, eye-catching patterns, some of which might even show in your human form.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

heritages.name: Snaring Anadi
heritages.description: You were hatched with hooked fangs that give you an edge when hunting in your true form.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

heritages.name: Spindly Anadi
heritages.description: Your limbs are exceptionally long in both forms, allowing you to skitter about with surprising agility.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

heritages.name: Venomous Anadi
heritages.description: Your natural form's fangs are capable of injecting foes with venom.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Anadi people are reclusive, sapient spiders who hail from the jungles of southern Garund.

name: Android

heritages.name: Artisan Android
heritages.description: Your body was originally designed to create works of art, complex tools, or maintain advanced machinery.

heritages.name: Impersonator Android
heritages.description: Your body was augmented with processes and an appearance intended to blend in with humans more easily.

heritages.name: Laborer Android
heritages.description: Your body is adapted to endure physical hardships or perform hard labor for long periods of time.

heritages.name: Polyglot Android
heritages.description: You were preprogrammed with a multitude of linguistic proficiencies, likely to act as a translator.

heritages.name: Warrior Android
heritages.description: Your body was originally created to function as a security officer or soldier.

description: Technological wonders from another world, androids have synthetic bodies and living souls.

name: Athamaru

heritages.name: Coral Athamaru
heritages.description: Coral covers patches of your body, which provides a natural layer of defense.

heritages.name: Hopeful Athamaru
heritages.description: You have begun to prepare yourself to become an athamaru matriarch, and are likely stepping outside of your community to better prepare yourself as a leader.

heritages.name: Kaleidoscopic Athamaru
heritages.description: Your scales are a spectrum of color that shimmers in the light.

heritages.name: Quilled Athamaru
heritages.description: Sharp quills on your head can pierce your foes deeply.

description: Athamarus are fish-like humanoids who form tight-knit undersea communities.

name: Automaton

heritages.name: Hunter Automaton
heritages.description: You were designed to serve as a scout or assassin and have a body resembling a pack hunter like a large cat or wolf.

heritages.name: Mage Automaton
heritages.description: The chamber housing your core has a more direct connection to the rest of your humanoid shape, allowing you to tap into your core's magical energy.

heritages.name: Sharpshooter Automaton
heritages.description: Your lithe, humanoid shape is designed for speed and accuracy suitable for ranged combat.

heritages.name: Warrior Automaton
heritages.description: Sporting a bulkier, powerful design, your body has been designed for combat.

description: These intelligent constructs house actual souls and represent what remains of a dying empire's last attempt at greatness.

name: Awakened Animal

heritages.name: Climbing Animal
heritages.description: You are an animal whose limbs are adapted to grab, climb, and brachiate.

heritages.name: Flying Animal
heritages.description: You are an animal that can take flight for long or sustained bursts, such as an eagle, bat, bee, or flying squirrel.

heritages.name: Running Animal
heritages.description: You are an animal meant for running at great speeds across land.

heritages.name: Swimming Animal
heritages.description: You are an aquatic animal who is most comfortable in the water.

description: You once enjoyed the simple and boundless pleasures of nature with an innocent, uncluttered mind.

name: Azarketi

heritages.name: Ancient Scale Azarketi
heritages.description: Your lineage stems from azarketis who remain dedicated to their deep-sea roots.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens

heritages.name: Benthic Azarketi
heritages.description: Your heritage traces to azarketis living deep beneath the sea, and you can handle the chilling depths more easily than most.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens

heritages.name: Inured Azarketi
heritages.description: Your ancestors had to survive in polluted water that made every breath noxious.

heritages.name: Mistbreath Azarketi
heritages.description: You descend from azarketis who migrated to land environments that could support their need for water.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens

heritages.name: Murkeyed Azarketi
heritages.description: You live in murky waters and have grown accustomed to life in a low-visibility environment.

heritages.name: River Azarketi
heritages.description: You come from azarketis who abandoned the oceans for the fresh water of inland life.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens

heritages.name: Spined Azarketi
heritages.description: Your fins conceal launchable toxic spines.

heritages.name: Tactile Azarketi
heritages.description: Your skin can detect the slightest changes in ocean currents.

heritages.name: Thalassic Azarketi
heritages.description: You trace your lineage from azarketis who lived their lives among the great oceans and seas of the world.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens
description: Azarketis, inheritors of a shattered empire's legacy, hold their proud traditions close but still surface to interact with the rest of the world.

name: Catfolk

heritages.name: Clawed Catfolk
heritages.description: Your family has particularly long, sharp claws capable of delivering bleeding wounds with a wicked swipe.

heritages.name: Flexible Catfolk
heritages.description: You've inherited flexibility beyond that of most humanoids.

heritages.name: Hunting Catfolk
heritages.description: You come from a long line of skilled hunters and trackers and have a particularly keen sense of smell.

heritages.name: Jungle Catfolk
heritages.description: You're descended from jungle stalkers and can move swiftly through scrub and underbrush.

heritages.name: Liminal Catfolk
heritages.description: You've inherited a closeness to the far corners of the world, where the boundaries between dimensions grow thin.

heritages.name: Nine Lives Catfolk
heritages.description: Your family has always seems to bounce back from disaster, not through physical hardiness or specialized skill, but from sheer luck.

heritages.name: Sharp-Eared Catfolk
heritages.description: You were born with big, expressive ears that move with your moods and perk up at any unexpected sound.

heritages.name: Winter Catfolk
heritages.description: You have a thick coat of fur that protects you from the cold.

description: Curious and gregarious wanderers, catfolk combine the features of felines and humanoids in both appearance and temperament.

name: Centaur

heritages.name: Budding Speaker Centaur
heritages.description: You were born with a spark of magic that could set you on the path to becoming a Greenspeaker or Faithspeaker.

heritages.name: Fleetwind Centaur
heritages.description: You're sleek of frame and capable of reaching incredible speeds on hooves alone.

heritages.name: Ironhoof Centaur
heritages.description: Your hooves are incredibly strong and serve as formidable weapons.

heritages.name: Mottle-Coat Centaur
heritages.description: Your coat is mottled or striped, granting you natural camouflage in your home environment.

heritages.name: Ponygait Centaur
heritages.description: You are smaller than most other centaurs, though no less fleet of foot.

heritages.name: Stoutheart Centaur
heritages.description: You're a hardy centaur, firm of stance and strong of heart.

description: Centaurs are proud nomads who range far and wide across their ancestral territories, protecting their lands from exploitation and intrusion.

name: Conrasu

heritages.name: Rite of Invocation
heritages.description: You augmented your exoskeleton with magic.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

heritages.name: Rite of Knowing
heritages.description: You enhanced your exoskeleton with a connection to Axis, allowing you to tap into the infinite knowledge of the plane.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

heritages.name: Rite of Light
heritages.description: Your exoskeleton bears small shoots that can share life.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

heritages.name: Rite of Passage
heritages.description: Your exoskeleton remains connected with the plants that created it.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

heritages.name: Rite of Reinforcement
heritages.description: Your woven exoskeleton rivals the hardest armors that can be found.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Conrasus are shards of cosmic force given consciousness who construct intricate exoskeletons to interface with the mortal world.

name: Dwarf

heritages.name: Ancient-Blooded Dwarf
heritages.description: Dwarven heroes of old could shrug off their enemies' magic, and some of that resistance manifests in you.

heritages.name: Anvil Dwarf
heritages.description: You are a descendant of a famed crafter and have your own amazing talent.

heritages.name: Death Warden Dwarf
heritages.description: Your ancestors were tomb guardians, and their power to ward off death passed on to you.

heritages.name: Elemental Heart Dwarf
heritages.description: Whether through a connection to Torag's forge, the azers of the Plane of Fire, or another source, you can exude a burst of energy.

heritages.name: Forge Dwarf
heritages.description: You have a remarkable adaptation to hot environments.

heritages.name: Forge-Blessed Dwarf
heritages.description: You are from a family in Highhelm that venerates a particular dwarven deity above all others.

heritages.name: Oathkeeper Dwarf
heritages.description: Growing up, you never tried to lie to get what you wanted, and even when necessary, lying makes you uncomfortable.

heritages.name: Rock Dwarf
heritages.description: Your ancestors lived and worked among the ancient stones of the mountains or the depths of the earth.

heritages.name: Strong-Blooded Dwarf
heritages.description: Your blood runs hearty and strong, and you can shake off toxins.

description: Dwarves have a well-earned reputation as a stoic and stern people, ensconced within citadels and cities carved from solid rock.

name: Elf

heritages.name: Ancient Elf
heritages.description: In your long life, you've dabbled in many paths and many styles.

heritages.name: Arctic Elf
heritages.description: You dwell deep in the frozen north and have gained incredible resilience against cold environments, granting you cold resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1).

heritages.name: Cavern Elf
heritages.description: You were born or spent many years in underground tunnels or caverns where light is scarce.

heritages.name: Desert Elf
heritages.description: You live under the desert's blazing heat, gaining incredible resilience to warm environments.

heritages.name: Seer Elf
heritages.description: You have an inborn ability to detect and understand magical phenomena.

heritages.name: Whisper Elf
heritages.description: Your ears are finely tuned, able to detect even the slightest whispers of sound.

heritages.name: Woodland Elf
heritages.description: You're adapted to life in the forest, the deep jungle, or a similar environment, and you know how to climb trees and use foliage to your advantage.

description: As an ancient people, elves have seen great change and have the perspective that can come only from watching the arc of history.

name: Fetchling

heritages.name: Bright Fetchling
heritages.description: Your body proves that shadow can't exist without light.

heritages.name: Deep Fetchling
heritages.description: Your predecessors dwelled in the Shadow Plane's deepest, most treacherous regions.

heritages.name: Liminal Fetchling
heritages.description: You come from a line of fetchlings with a closer connection to the Ethereal and Shadow Planes, and you share those realms' affinity with the in-between and unseen.

heritages.name: Resolute Fetchling
heritages.description: Your ancestors have long dealt with the horrific—in the Shadow Plane or elsewhere—and you bear their mental fortitude.

heritages.name: Wisp Fetchling
heritages.description: Your ancestors' exposure to the Shadow Plane wrought great physical changes.

description: Once human and now something apart, fetchlings display the Shadow Plane's ancient influence through monochrome complexions, glowing eyes, and the casting of supernatural shadows.

name: Fleshwarp

heritages.name: Cataphract Fleshwarp
heritages.description: Your battle-hardened skeleton is laced with additional cartilage and muscle to help bear armor across vast areas of operation, and your skin is bedecked with tiny spurs of pliable, resilient keratin to optimize the grip and weight distribution of your armor.

heritages.name: Created Fleshwarp
heritages.description: You were created through occult or alchemical processes, such as being grown in a vat or stitched together from the body parts of other creatures by a scientist in Ustalav.

heritages.name: Discarded Fleshwarp
heritages.description: The biomancers and mutagenists who warped your form labeled you a "discard on discovery"—a euphemism for destroying you on sight.

heritages.name: Mutated Fleshwarp
heritages.description: Transformed by uncontrolled magic, you originated in a the Mana Wastes or another region similarly devastated by uncontrolled magic.

heritages.name: Shapewrought Fleshwarp
heritages.description: A victim of fleshwarping, you likely bear loose flesh, bony spurs, or features of inhuman creatures sprouting from your skin.

heritages.name: Surgewise Fleshwarp
heritages.description: The undulations of your body's cilia are hyper-attuned to wellsprings of magic; they trill and thrum with insights into occult energies, and their vibrations alert you to the presence of secrets.

heritages.name: Technological Fleshwarp
heritages.description: Your transformation is due to manipulation by advanced technology, like that found in Numeria.

description: Fleshwarps are people whose forms were created or radically transformed by magic, alchemy, or unnatural energies.

name: Ghoran

heritages.name: Ancient Ash
heritages.description: Your memory is sharp and clear, and you remember so much.

heritages.name: Enchanting Lily
heritages.description: You smell ever so sweet—a delicate, floral scent like the intoxicating fragrance of lilies and the soft scent of lilacs.

heritages.name: Strong Oak
heritages.description: Most ghorans have bodies of pliable vines and tough stems, but you're covered in sturdy, rough bark and your legs are stable as roots.

heritages.name: Thorned Rose
heritages.description: Your beautiful petals and seemingly smooth skin hide silent barbs to pierce the unwary.

description: These intelligent plant people, created by a long-dead druid, possess a sort of immortality through their seeds—unless these are destroyed by external events other than merely the ravages of time.

name: Gnome

heritages.name: Chameleon Gnome
heritages.description: The color of your hair and skin is mutable, possibly due to latent magic from First World influences or lingering illusion effects.

heritages.name: Fey-Touched Gnome
heritages.description: The blood of the fey flows through your veins, saturating you with their magic and making you truly one of them.

heritages.name: Kijimuna Gnome
heritages.description: Your ancestors lived in the trees and fished in all the waters of Tian Xia.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Sensate Gnome
heritages.description: You see all colors as brighter, hear all sounds as richer, and especially smell all scents with incredible detail.

heritages.name: Umbral Gnome
heritages.description: Whether from a connection to dark or shadowy fey, from the underground gnomes known as drathnelar, or from another source, you can see in complete darkness.

heritages.name: Vivacious Gnome
heritages.description: You have an incredibly strong connection to the vitality energy that flows through the First World, making it harder to attack your life force with void energy.

heritages.name: Wellspring Gnome
heritages.description: Some other source of magic has a greater hold on you than the primal magic of your fey lineage does.

description: Long ago, early gnome ancestors emigrated from the First World, realm of the fey.

name: Goblin

heritages.name: Charhide Goblin
heritages.description: Your ancestors have always had a connection to fire and a thicker skin, which allows you to resist burning.

heritages.name: Dokkaebi Goblin
heritages.description: Your ancestors mastered illusion-based magic, giving you an innate understanding of it.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Irongut Goblin
heritages.description: You can subsist on food that most folks would consider spoiled.

heritages.name: Razortooth Goblin
heritages.description: Your family's teeth are formidable weapons.

heritages.name: Snow Goblin
heritages.description: You are acclimated to living in frigid lands and have skin ranging from sky blue to navy in color, as well as blue fur.

heritages.name: Tailed Goblin
heritages.description: You have a powerful tail, likely because you descend from a community of monkey goblins.

heritages.name: Treedweller Goblin
heritages.description: You have adapted particularly well to living in forested environments.

heritages.name: Unbreakable Goblin
heritages.description: You're able to bounce back from injuries easily due to an exceptionally thick skull, cartilaginous bones, or some other mixed blessing.

description: The convoluted histories other people cling to don't interest goblins.

name: Goloma

heritages.name: Farsight Goloma
heritages.description: Your eyes have adapted to see more in less than favorable conditions.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

heritages.name: Frightful Goloma
heritages.description: Your face has a particularly off-putting appearance.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

heritages.name: Insightful Goloma
heritages.description: You've learned to watch for telltale signs of dangerous sentiments to help you avoid trouble.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

heritages.name: Vicious Goloma
heritages.description: The chitin on your hands forms powerful claws that allow you to defend yourself.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

heritages.name: Vigilant Goloma
heritages.description: You've learned to be aware of not just obvious physical dangers, but also noticeable magical threats.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Golomas fear most other people and deliberately use their unusual biology to frighten off those they consider to be dangerous predators.

name: Halfling

heritages.name: Gutsy Halfling
heritages.description: Your family line is known for keeping a level head and staving off fear when the chips were down.

heritages.name: Hillock Halfling
heritages.description: Accustomed to a calm life in the hills, your people find rest and relaxation especially replenishing, particularly when indulging in creature comforts.

heritages.name: Jinxed Halfling
heritages.description: You were born with a strange blessing: bereft of the typical halfling luck, you can instead manipulate the fortunes of others.

heritages.name: Nomadic Halfling
heritages.description: Your ancestors have traveled from place to place for generations, never content to settle down.

heritages.name: Observant Halfling
heritages.description: Your finely honed senses quickly clue you in to danger or trickery.

heritages.name: Twilight Halfling
heritages.description: Your ancestors performed many secret acts under the concealing cover of dusk, whether for good or ill, and over time they developed the ability to see in twilight beyond even the usual keen sight of halflings.

heritages.name: Wildwood Halfling
heritages.description: You hail from deep within a jungle or forest, and you've learned how to use your small size to wriggle through undergrowth and other obstacles.

description: Claiming no place as their own, halflings control few settlements larger than villages.

name: Hobgoblin

heritages.name: Elfbane Hobgoblin
heritages.description: Hobgoblins were engineered long ago from the unreliable and fecund goblins to be used as an army against the elves.

heritages.name: Runtboss Hobgoblin
heritages.description: You come from a long line of hobgoblins who commanded goblins.

heritages.name: Shortshanks Hobgoblin
heritages.description: You have a longer torso and broader shoulders than most hobgoblins, making your legs seem short by comparison.

heritages.name: Smokeworker Hobgoblin
heritages.description: Your family have been alchemists, engineers, and scientists for generations, laboring on projects that bring smoke and fire to the field of battle.

heritages.name: Steelskin Hobgoblin
heritages.description: When you are cut or burned, your body responds by forming tough but flexible callouses over the site of the injury.

heritages.name: Warmarch Hobgoblin
heritages.description: You come from a line of wandering mercenaries constantly on the march and scavenging food on the trail.

heritages.name: Warrenbred Hobgoblin
heritages.description: Your ancestors lived underground.

description: Taller and stronger than their goblin kin, hobgoblins are equals in strength and size to humans, with broad shoulders and long, powerful arms.

name: Human

heritages.name: Battle-Trained Human (BB)
heritages.description: Your family has trained in battle for generations, granting you advantages in a fight.

heritages.name: Skilled Human
heritages.description: Your ingenuity allows you to train in a wide variety of skills.

heritages.name: Versatile Human
heritages.description: Humanity's versatility and ambition have fueled its ascendance to be the most common ancestry in most nations throughout the world.

heritages.name: Warden Human (BB)
heritages.description: You and your family members are survivors, and you've learned how to take care of yourself.

heritages.name: Wintertouched Human
heritages.description: The power of winter flows through you.

description: As unpredictable and varied as any of Golarion's peoples, humans have exceptional drive and the capacity to endure and expand.

name: Kashrishi

heritages.name: Athamasi
heritages.description: You have a set of small secondary arms adapted for climbing and hanging from trees.

heritages.name: Lethoci
heritages.description: You come from a kashrishi family adapted to coastal shores, or inland ponds and lakes.

heritages.name: Nascent
heritages.description: While most kashrishi are fully adapted to their environment by the time they reach adulthood, some retain unrealized potential well into adulthood before unlocking it.

heritages.name: Trogloshi
heritages.description: You're adapted to the sunless regions of dense jungle forests and deep caves, with soft flesh lacking pigment and unusually clear crystalline horns.

heritages.name: Xyloshi
heritages.description: You have prominent neck muscles that allow you to use your facial horn as a tool or weapon.

description: Kashrishi make their homes in remote areas of the world.

name: Kholo

heritages.name: Ant Kholo
heritages.description: You're a sharp-featured, big-eared kholo about 3 feet tall.

heritages.name: Cave Kholo
heritages.description: Storytellers spin ancient tales claiming that kholo lived in caves and underground before most of your kind ventured into the light.

heritages.name: Dog Kholo
heritages.description: You're a nimble-bodied kholo with a prehistoric, almost dog-like build.

heritages.name: Great Kholo
heritages.description: You're an imposing, powerful kholo, with tawny fur and brown spots on your hide.

heritages.name: Sweetbreath Kholo
heritages.description: You're a striped, pale-furred kholo with oddly pleasant breath, which you can use to entrance your prey.

heritages.name: Winter Kholo
heritages.description: You're a hardy kholo covered in thick, tufted fur that makes you able to survive in the harsh winters of the colder territories.

heritages.name: Witch Kholo
heritages.description: You're a shaggy, dark-furred kholo capable of making some truly uncanny sounds.

description: Kholo have bad reputations as brutal raiders and demon-worshipers.

name: Kitsune

heritages.name: Celestial Envoy Kitsune
heritages.description: Whether due to Daikitsu's grace or faithful forebears, you have a strong connection to the divine, affording you certain protections.

heritages.name: Dark Fields Kitsune
heritages.description: You can exert your unsettling presence to subtly Demoralize others.

heritages.name: Earthly Wilds Kitsune
heritages.description: You are a creature of the material world, with an affinity closer to the wilds than urban society.

heritages.name: Empty Sky Kitsune
heritages.description: Your spirit is open to the secrets of beyond, granting you greater access to kitsune magic.

heritages.name: Frozen Wind Kitsune
heritages.description: Your ancestors crossed the Crown of the World or resided on snowy peaks.

heritages.name: Palace Echoes Kitsune
heritages.description: You descend from kitsune who possessed such compelling powers of persuasion that they could walk into a palace at sunrise and end up as the power behind the throne by nightfall.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

description: Kitsune are a charismatic and witty people with a connection to the spiritual that grants them many magical abilities, chiefly the power to shapechange into other forms.

name: Kobold

heritages.name: Caveclimber Kobold
heritages.description: You live in a vertically-oriented home, and you're a consummate climber.

heritages.name: Cavernstalker Kobold
heritages.description: You hatched in a warren with narrow tunnels that was also home to a being of primal earth energy, which has made you limber and flexible.

heritages.name: Dragonscaled Kobold
heritages.description: Thanks to your warren's association with a dragon, your scales are sturdier than other kobolds'.

heritages.name: Elementheart Kobold
heritages.description: When you hatched, you imprinted on a creature strongly associated with one of the Elemental Planes, such as an elemental or genie.

heritages.name: Heavenscribe Kobold
heritages.description: Your connection to wise and celestial imperial dragons has led others to seek your advice.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Mightyfall Kobold
heritages.description: Your proximity to a mighty kaiju has caused you to grow strong and hardy.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Spellhorn Kobold
heritages.description: Since hatching in the vicinity of a powerful source of magic, a trace of it flows through your veins.

heritages.name: Strongjaw Kobold
heritages.description: Your warren is noted for their powerful jaws and sharp teeth, either to help protect against natural predators or due to reverence of a mighty beast.

heritages.name: Tunnelflood Kobold
heritages.description: You grew up in a warren crisscrossed by underwater passages, whether natural or excavated, and were influenced by a powerful aquatic entity or being of primal water.

heritages.name: Venomtail Kobold
heritages.description: Thanks to the proximity of a venomous creature to your warren, you were born with a vestigial spur in your tail that secretes deadly venom.

description: Every kobold instinctively understands the importance of power, and many are inclined to venerate those who have it, whether they be mighty dragons, cruel fiends, imperious fey, or even ancient artifacts.

name: Leshy

heritages.name: Cactus Leshy
heritages.description: Spines cover your body.

heritages.name: Chrysanthemum Leshy
heritages.description: You look like a human child, though with a grand crown of chrysanthemums growing from your head, ornate as an emperor's.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Fruit Leshy
heritages.description: Your body continually produces small fruits imbued with primal magic.

heritages.name: Fungus Leshy
heritages.description: Your body was made from fungi that grows in the shade of caves and trees, and you are at home in dark caverns and warrens.

heritages.name: Gourd Leshy
heritages.description: You have a large gourd for a skull, and since you don't have a physical brain, you can use the space inside your head.

heritages.name: Leaf Leshy
heritages.description: Your body is made mostly from natural foliage, and like a leaf tumbling from a tree, you land from falls with particular grace.

heritages.name: Lotus Leshy
heritages.description: You effortlessly float on the surface of water.

heritages.name: Peachchild Leshy
heritages.description: Your leshy spirit took hold in a massive peach fruit before your body split forth from it, possibly emulating a past hero who was born in the same manner.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Pine Leshy
heritages.description: You excrete a thick, sticky sap from your bark-like flesh, making it easier to climb and hold onto your gear.

heritages.name: Root Leshy
heritages.description: Your body is made from hardy roots that attach you firmly to the ground.

heritages.name: Seaweed Leshy
heritages.description: Your body is made from woven seaweed, and you're just as comfortable underwater as on land.

heritages.name: Vine Leshy
heritages.description: Your prehensile vines grant you unmatched skill at climbing.

description: Guardians and emissaries of the environment, leshies are immortal spirits of nature temporarily granted a physical form.

name: Lizardfolk

heritages.name: Bakuwa Lizardfolk
heritages.description: Your body is covered in bony plates.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Cliffscale Lizardfolk
heritages.description: Your toes are adapted for gripping and climbing.

heritages.name: Cloudleaper Lizardfolk
heritages.description: Your body is light with flaps of skin along your limbs that catch the air that passes beneath you.

heritages.name: Frilled Lizardfolk
heritages.description: You can flare your neck frill and flex your dorsal spines, Demoralizing your foes.

heritages.name: Makari Lizardfolk
heritages.description: You have a trunk-like snout and a connection to the divine.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Sandstrider Lizardfolk
heritages.description: Your thick scales help you retain water and combat the sun's glare.

heritages.name: Unseen Lizardfolk
heritages.description: You can change your skin color to blend in with your surroundings, making minor shifts with a single action and dramatic changes over the course of an hour.

heritages.name: Wetlander Lizardfolk
heritages.description: Your family is descended from the most common lizardfolk heritage, and you are accustomed to aquatic environments.

heritages.name: Woodstalker Lizardfolk
heritages.description: You move easily through thick forest and jungle, using every branch or bush.

description: Lizardfolk are consummate survivors, heirs to empires considered ancient even by the elves.

name: Merfolk

heritages.name: Abyssal Merfolk
heritages.description: You live far, far below the surface of the ocean.

heritages.name: Carcharodon Merfolk
heritages.description: As a fearsome shark merfolk, your lower body is similar to that of one of the apex predators of the ocean.

heritages.name: Pelagic Merfolk
heritages.description: You're a merfolk of the open seas.

heritages.name: Reef Merfolk
heritages.description: You were raised amid colorful corals and schools of tropical fish.

heritages.name: Sailfish Merfolk
heritages.description: The lower half of your body resembles a powerful sailfish, complete with a large dorsal fin.

description: Merfolk live in every ocean of Golarion, infinite in their variety and awe-inspiring in their majesty.

name: Minotaur

heritages.name: Ghost Bull Minotaur
heritages.description: Your fur is as pale as death, possibly from some connection you or your family has to the afterlife, which lets you supernaturally find your way.

heritages.name: Glacier Cavern Minotaur
heritages.description: Your fur grows thick and warm, well suited to the frozen mountains in which you reside.

heritages.name: Littlehorn Minotaur
heritages.description: Though no less powerful, your frame (and your horns) are smaller than those of most other minotaurs.

heritages.name: Roaming Minotaur
heritages.description: Your hooves are broad and powerful, perfect for clearing away rubble as you step.

heritages.name: Slabsoul Minotaur
heritages.description: Your deep connection with stone and walls allows you to conjure massive slabs of granite that collapse on your foes.

heritages.name: Stalker Minotaur
heritages.description: Despite your heavy frame, you walk on shaggy hooves that muffle your footfalls, allowing you to surprise your prey.

description: Minotaurs stalk complex passageways, whether natural or artificial, and are masters of stone architecture.

name: Nagaji

heritages.name: Hooded Nagaji
heritages.description: You bear the hooded head of a spitting cobra, and like such cobras, you can shoot streams of venom from your mouth.

heritages.name: Sacred Nagaji
heritages.description: You stand out from most nagaji, with the upper body of a beautiful human and the lower body of a green or white snake.

heritages.name: Shimmertongue Nagaji
heritages.description: You were born with a keen sense for magic, able to taste its unique effects in the air.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Titan Nagaji
heritages.description: You were raised to be a warrior or a bodyguard, and your specialized diet and bulging muscles have made your scales as strong as armored plates.

heritages.name: Venomshield Nagaji
heritages.description: Your intrinsic connection to nagas and mundane serpents grants you an innate resistance to toxins of every sort.

heritages.name: Whipfang Nagaji
heritages.description: You have a long, flexible neck that can curl into a striking pose like that of a snake.

description: With humanoid figures and serpentine heads, nagaji are heralds, companions, and servitors of powerful nagas.

name: Orc

heritages.name: Badlands Orc
heritages.description: You come from sun-scorched badlands, where long legs and an ability to withstand the elements helped you thrive.

heritages.name: Battle-Ready Orc
heritages.description: You descend from a line of terrifying battlefield commanders.

heritages.name: Deep Orc
heritages.description: Your calloused hands and red eyes speak to a life spent in the deep darkness of mountain caverns, where you learned to battle on rocky cliffs and survive with minimal resources.

heritages.name: Grave Orc
heritages.description: You were exposed to powerful necromantic energies that should have killed you—but you survived.

heritages.name: Hold-Scarred Orc
heritages.description: You are part of an orc community that participates in ritual scarification or tattooing.

heritages.name: Rainfall Orc
heritages.description: You were born in a rain forest with only tangles of trees providing protection from torrential rainstorms and flash floods.

heritages.name: Winter Orc
heritages.description: Your ancestors survived in cold climates.

description: Orcs are forged in the fires of violence and conflict, often from the moment they are born.

name: Poppet

heritages.name: Ghost Poppet
heritages.description: You awakened when a bit of another person's life force and a fragment of their soul-possibly, but not always, at the moment of their death-found its way into your constructed body.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

heritages.name: Stuffed Poppet
heritages.description: You have little inside you other than cotton, sawdust, or dried leaves.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

heritages.name: Toy Poppet
heritages.description: You have the form of a child's tiny toy or doll, but you don't let your small size impede your joy of life.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

heritages.name: Tsukumogami Poppet
heritages.description: You have the form and memories of a common tool.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Windup Poppet
heritages.description: You're made primarily of soft metals, such as tin or silver, and your life force dwells within an exceptional array of clockworks deep in your body.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

heritages.name: Wishborn Poppet
heritages.description: You were wished to life, either by a powerful spellcaster or by the earnest desire of an innocent person who loved you very much.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: Poppets are small, basic constructs that typically help their owners with simple tasks.

name: Ratfolk

heritages.name: Deep Rat
heritages.description: Your ancestors lived deeper underground than other ratfolk, granting you the ability to see in the dark.

heritages.name: Desert Rat
heritages.description: You are native to arid plains and likely grew up traveling the roads.

heritages.name: Longsnout Rat
heritages.description: Your long snout gives you a keener sense of smell than most ratfolk.

heritages.name: Sewer Rat
heritages.description: You come from a long line of ratfolk with a community based in the sewers beneath a large settlement.

heritages.name: Shadow Rat
heritages.description: Your ancestors lived in dark spaces underground, granting you dark fur and a vaguely unnatural mien.

heritages.name: Snow Rat
heritages.description: You have a thicker coat and bulkier frame to defend against the cold, granting you cold resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1).

heritages.name: Tunnel Rat
heritages.description: You can easily compress your body and squeeze through gaps.

description: Ysoki are beings that most surface-dwelling humanoids refer to as "ratfolk." They are a communal people who prefer cramped conditions, with up to 100 individuals living in a given home.

name: Samsaran

heritages.name: Healer Samsaran
heritages.description: In seeking enlightenment, your past incarnations have wandered away from the ancestral homelands of Zi Ha, exploring the different nations of Tian Xia and elsewhere in Golarion.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Mountaineer Samsaran
heritages.description: Your past incarnations dwelled in the caves on the snowcapped mountains of Tian Xia, so your body has become adept at surviving frigid storms.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Oracular Samsaran
heritages.description: Your past lives have provided heightened insight to the spiritual world and current and future events, as history repeats itself.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Sanctuary Samsaran
heritages.description: Your past incarnations were reborn in sanctuaries in northern Zi Ha, and you have recollections of being trained to concentrate and focus for long periods of time.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Wilderness Samsaran
heritages.description: Your preceding lives have been reborn in various remote environments away from major settlements in Tian Xia and beyond.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Samsarans, as the tale goes, originated with a group of scholars in Zi Ha who ventured into the mountains to find the cure for an illness ravaging their village.

name: Sarangay

heritages.name: Full Moon Sarangay
heritages.description: You were raised in a shamanic tradition transcending a single sarangay community or heritage.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Half Moon Sarangay
heritages.description: You come from one of many traveling communities that migrate seasonally along Tian Xia's vast rivers and mountains, bringing news and tidings to villages along their path.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: New Moon Sarangay
heritages.description: Some people call you a dwarf sarangay and your kind "hiding ones." Others whisper you go out with the moon when the moon "goes hunting"—a common folk saying for when the new moon vanishes from the sky.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Waning Moon Sarangay
heritages.description: Your ancestors were named for the moon in transition, ever-changing and ephemeral.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Waxing Moon Sarangay
heritages.description: Your ancestors dwelled in the swamps, fens, and flooded forests, where they contended with fierce predators and formed raiding parties to claim scarce resources.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Sarangay are carabao-headed people who have long survived deep in the forests across Tian Xia.

name: Shisk

heritages.name: Lorekeeper Shisk
heritages.description: You grew up surrounded by knowledge and secrets.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

heritages.name: Quillcoat Shisk
heritages.description: Your body has adapted a defensive mechanism to break off your quills in an attacker, allowing you to defend yourself against aggressive predators, though it takes a while for the quills to grow back.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

heritages.name: Spellkeeper Shisk
heritages.description: Your magical knowledge allows you to cast simple spells.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

heritages.name: Stonestep Shisk
heritages.description: Navigating mountains and other rocky terrain is second nature to you.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

heritages.name: Stronggut Shisk
heritages.description: Your metabolism is slow, allowing you to go for days without food and process maladies at a slower rate.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Shisks are secretive mountain-dwellers, bone-feathered humanoids who lurk underground in dark tunnels and caverns.

name: Shoony

heritages.name: Bloodhound Shoony
heritages.description: Your ancestors were famous trackers, and you carry in your blood that same gift of the hunt.

heritages.name: Fishseeker Shoony
heritages.description: You come from a long line of fisherfolk and have inherited the quick reflexes necessary to nab and reel in big game.

heritages.name: Paddler Shoony
heritages.description: You hail from shoonies who have lived long and successfully among the reeds and cattails of swamps and marshes, and have adapted to the challenges of living near waterlogged areas.

heritages.name: Thickcoat Shoony
heritages.description: You are a rare shoony who hails from colder climes.

description: Diminutive humanoids who resemble squat, bipedal dogs, shoonies are sometimes mistaken for weak and insular pacifists.

name: Skeleton

heritages.name: Compact Skeleton
heritages.description: For tasks that require a lighter touch, gnome, goblin, and halfling remains are more suitable than a larger creature's.

heritages.name: Fodder Skeleton
heritages.description: Humans, and those who are physically closest to them, are the favored material of necromancers.

heritages.name: Monstrous Skeleton
heritages.description: Inhuman skeletons are often created for both their deadly physical attacks and their terrifying appearances.

heritages.name: Shifting Skeleton
heritages.description: Constructed from the bones of various shapechanging creatures, shifting skeletons retain a measure of reconfigurability, allowing them to shift forms.

heritages.name: Sturdy Skeleton
heritages.description: Certain hazardous conditions are not suitable for the average skeleton, so a necromancer might choose to reanimate the bones of a dwarf, orc, or other creature with a reputation for sturdiness.

description: Skeletons are considered among the lowest types of undead.

name: Sprite

heritages.name: Dijiang
heritages.description: You have the form of a faceless, leathery ball with short fur, six legs, and a connection to primordial chaos.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Draxie
heritages.description: You are kin to faerie dragons, tracing your heritage back to the death of the mightiest faerie dragon in the First World.

heritages.name: Gandharva
heritages.description: You're descended from the self-proclaimed musicians, poets, and dancers of the gods, with a body that's part humanoid and part horse or bird.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Grig
heritages.description: You have the hindquarters of a cricket and adore art and music.

heritages.name: Kanchil
heritages.description: You have the head of a mouse deer and hooves instead of feet, with a reputation for being clever and persuasive—able to get yourself out of sticky situations with wordplay and a bit of luck.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Leungli
heritages.description: You have the head of a goldfish or carp and scales that come in an auspicious combination of stark white, black, orange, red, and gold.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Luminous Sprite
heritages.description: You glow with magical luminance.

heritages.name: Melixie
heritages.description: You have the features of a bee, butterfly, or other insect that loves sweets.

heritages.name: Nyktera
heritages.description: You have batlike features, an affinity for batkind, and hearing that is second to none.

heritages.name: Pixie
heritages.description: You are larger than other sprites.

description: Sprites are diminutive, whimsical, and exuberant creatures from the fey realm known as the First World.

name: Strix

heritages.name: Nightglider Strix
heritages.description: You are a dedicated nocturnal avian, keeping watch and predating in the most lightless environments.

heritages.name: Predator Strix
heritages.description: You come from a line of strix with exceptionally broad wings and lengthy talons.

heritages.name: Scavenger Strix
heritages.description: Your ancestors originated from a land where food was scarce and threats were many.

heritages.name: Shoreline Strix
heritages.description: You're the descendant of strix who traveled to the coasts.

heritages.name: Songbird Strix
heritages.description: You descend from a talented line of strix storytellers.

description: Known as itarii in their own language, strix are reclusive avian humanoids devoted to their homelands and their tribes.

name: Surki

heritages.name: Breaker Surki
heritages.description: Your claws are especially hard and can break through earth and predators alike.

heritages.name: Elytron Surki
heritages.description: The top layer of your carapace is especially mobile, and you can unfurl it to catch the air gracefully as you fall.

heritages.name: Hardshell Surki
heritages.description: Your carapace is much denser than that of other surkis, offering you a suit of your very own armor.

heritages.name: Lantern Surki
heritages.description: The nodes in your abdomen are particularly luminous.

description: Surkis are an insectile species who subsist on the latent magic in the world around them.

name: Tanuki

heritages.name: Ascetic Tanuki
heritages.description: It's said your round form is the result of calmness and restraint, not indulgence.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Courageous Tanuki
heritages.description: Your heart beats with the courage of those who came before you, giving you the kind of bravery only a tanuki can demonstrate.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Even-Tempered Tanuki
heritages.description: You're possessed of a serenity uncommon to other tanuki, who always seem to be flying off the handle.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Steadfast Tanuki
heritages.description: Your pride in your true tanuki form knows no bounds.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Virtuous Tanuki
heritages.description: Many tanuki carry a gourd of alcohol to remind themselves to act with virtue, and by these standards, you're quite virtuous indeed.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Tian Xia is replete with magically gifted ancestries—such as tengu, kitsune, yakshas, and yaoguai—whose powers bring them high regard and who, in turn, use their gifts for responsible ends.

name: Tengu

heritages.name: Dogtooth Tengu
heritages.description: In addition to a beak, your mouth also features a number of vicious, pointed teeth.

heritages.name: Jinxed Tengu
heritages.description: Your lineage has been exposed to curse after curse, and now they slide off your feathers like rain.

heritages.name: Mountainkeeper Tengu
heritages.description: You come from a line of tengu ascetics, leaving you with a link to the spirits of the world and the Great Beyond.

heritages.name: Skyborn Tengu
heritages.description: Your bones may be especially light, you may be a rare tengu with wings, or your connection to the spirits of wind and sky might be stronger than most, slowing your descent through the air.

heritages.name: Stormtossed Tengu
heritages.description: Whether due to a blessing from Hei Feng or hatching from your egg during a squall, you are resistant to storms.

heritages.name: Taloned Tengu
heritages.description: Your talons are every bit as sharp and strong as your beak.

heritages.name: Wavediver Tengu
heritages.description: You're one of the rare tengu who can cut through water like a bird through air, and you often lurk in rivers or oceans where few expect you.

description: Tengu are survivalists and conversationalists, equally at home living off the wilderness and finding a niche in dense cities.

name: Tripkee

heritages.name: Poisonhide Tripkee
heritages.description: You may be small, but the poison glands concealed across your body hide a deadly defense.

heritages.name: Riverside Tripkee
heritages.description: Your ancestors live in and on the water.

heritages.name: Snaptongue Tripkee
heritages.description: Your tongue is especially long, and you can launch it with extraordinary range and precision.

heritages.name: Stickytoe Tripkee
heritages.description: Your hands and feet exude a film that helps them adhere to surfaces.

heritages.name: Thickskin Tripkee
heritages.description: Your thick leathery skin resembles that of a toad.

heritages.name: Windweb Tripkee
heritages.description: Tough webbing along your hands and toes can slow any fall.

description: Tripkees are a shy and cautious people who generally seek to avoid being drawn into the affairs of others.

name: Vanara

heritages.name: Bandaagee Vanara
heritages.description: Your family is one of many who claims to be descended from the regal vanara peacekeeping family called the Bandaagee.

heritages.name: Lahkgyan Vanara
heritages.description: Your vanara ancestors might have been born in Ragdya's image, but they found survival only in service to his enemy: the red-faced Lahkgya.

heritages.name: Ragdyan Vanara
heritages.description: Keepers of traditions and tellers of ancient tales, your family traces its lineage to those born directly from Ragdya's whims.

heritages.name: Wajaghand Vanara
heritages.description: Your ancestors were forced into labor by the rakshasa immortal Ravana, the First and the Last.

description: Vanaras are inquisitive and mischievous monkey-like humanoids with short, soft fur, expressive eyes, and long, prehensile tails.

name: Vishkanya

heritages.name: Elusive Vishkanya
heritages.description: Your flexible body seems unnaturally fluid to some, though they can rarely put a finger on what seems strange about you.

heritages.name: Keen-Venom Vishkanya
heritages.description: You're practiced with using your venom in combat, allowing you to employ your venom at a moment's notice.

heritages.name: Old-Blood Vishkanya
heritages.description: You have a direct matrilineal line to the original group of vishkanyas upon the Vudrani ships that came to reclaim Jalmeray.

heritages.name: Prismatic Vishkanya
heritages.description: Your scales shimmer and catch the light in an intoxicating display of colors.

heritages.name: Scalekeeper Vishkanya
heritages.description: You are part of the family of vishkanyas in your community tasked with keeping records of the history and experiences of your people.

heritages.name: Venom-Resistant Vishkanya
heritages.description: Your body contains not just venom but numerous antivenoms.

description: Vishkanyas are ophidian humanoids who carry potent venom within their blood and saliva.

name: Wayang

heritages.name: Shadow of the Courtier
heritages.description: Your shadow dances alongside you.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Shadow of the Hermit
heritages.description: Your shadow seems somehow full of secrets and mysteries—secrets that it shares with you.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Shadow of the Sailor
heritages.description: Your shadow flits across the surface of the water, and so do you.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Shadow of the Smith
heritages.description: Your shadow is thick and liquid, like it could quench the finest ore.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Shadow of the Wanderer
heritages.description: Your shadow blazes out ahead of you, clearing your path.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Wayangs are diasporic sojourners from the Netherworld where they lived and worked alongside their allies, lightweaving d'ziriaks.

name: Yaksha

heritages.name: Deny Lady Nanbyo's Charity
heritages.description: You swore a vow to release others from natural calamities.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Deny the Firstborn Pursuit
heritages.description: You swore a vow to shelter others from the First World's cruelties.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Deny the Traitor's Rebirth
heritages.description: You swore a vow to deliver others from rakshasas and asuras, whom yaksha legends have condemned as corrupted kin.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Respite of a Thousand Roofs
heritages.description: You swore a vow to shelter and feed the poor.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Respite of Cloudless Paths
heritages.description: You swore a vow to protect the waylaid and the lost.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Respite of Loam and Leaf
heritages.description: You swore a vow to preserve the very foundation of sanctuary: the great earth and all that grows upon it.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Away from shining citadels and opulent palaces, reticent yakshas shelter Tian Xia's rural hinterlands from natural disasters and otherworldly depredations.

name: Yaoguai

heritages.name: Born of Animal
heritages.description: You were a simple animal until the sun enlightened you.Humanoid Form Animals can sense the power of your presence.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Born of Celestial
heritages.description: You were once a powerful celestial before an escape or great punishment left you trapped in a mortal shell, with only vague memories and limited power.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Born of Elements
heritages.description: You were an aspect of nature—the rain, the wind, a ray of light—until the wild essences gave you a soul.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Born of Item
heritages.description: You were an object until the moon breathed life into you.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

heritages.name: Born of Vegetation
heritages.description: You were a plant or fungi until the rain gifted you a mind.
heritages.source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Yaoguai usually begin as simple animals, plants, or objects before finding a way to awaken to sapience, becoming strange shapeshifting creatures in the process.
